# Galactic Code

> A space-themed RPG learning platform where programmers complete coding missions to earn XP, Credits, and gear — then battle Void Entities in the Combat Arena.

Galactic Code is a gamified programming education platform. Learning content is organized into **Star Systems** (months) broken into **Sectors** (weekly themes), each containing individual **Missions** (exercises). Completing missions earns XP (to rank up your pilot) and Credits (the in-game currency).

## The Learning → Combat Loop

1. Complete coding **Missions** in the Academy → earn XP and Credits
2. Spend Credits in the **Armory** on weapons, shields, and engines for your ship
3. Visit the **Hangar** to equip gear and view your effective combat stats
4. Enter the **Combat Arena** to fight Void Entities in turn-based battles
5. Win battles to earn bonus Credits, XP, and rare loot drops
6. Join a **Fleet** (guild) to tackle boss-tier entities cooperatively

## Key Public Pages

- [Home](/) — Platform overview and feature explanation
- [Sign Up](/sign-up) — Create a free account
- [Sign In](/sign-in) — Returning pilot login
- [Demo](/demo) — Try the full experience without an account

## Features

- **Missions** — Structured coding exercises across JavaScript, TypeScript, and more
- **XP & Ranks** — 10 pilot ranks unlocked by accumulating XP
- **Credits** — Earned from mission completion, spent in the Armory on gear
- **Ship Hangar** — View base stats, equip/unequip weapons, shields, and engines
- **Armory Shop** — 18 gear items across 5 rarity tiers (Common → Legendary)
- **Combat Arena** — Turn-based battles against 10 Void Entity types
- **Fleets** — Guild system for cooperative boss battles
- **Skill Checks** — Quiz system awarding 20–35 XP per pass
- **Focus Cycles** — Pomodoro-style timer with XP bonus on completion
- **Star Map** — Visual progress map of your learning journey
- **Leaderboard** — Global pilot ranking by XP

## Technology Stack

- **Framework**: Next.js 15 (App Router, TypeScript strict)
- **Database**: PostgreSQL via Neon (Drizzle ORM)
- **Auth**: Clerk
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS v4 + shadcn/ui
- **Hosting**: Vercel

## XP Reference

| Action | XP |
|---|---|
| Complete mission | 15 (20 with Focus Cycle) |
| Skip mission | 2 |
| Daily login | 5 |
| Skill check pass | 20 (35 if perfect) |
| Complete operation | 100 |
| 7-day streak bonus | +10 |
| 30-day streak bonus | +25 |
